final_prompt.prompt:
Create a PPT cover slide for GPT-5.5 domestic financing announcement, featuring Sam Altman as speaker, designed for Chinese VC roadshow conventions and GP tonality.

Style/medium: clean corporate presentation design with the understated authority of Chinese tech financing decks, balancing global credibility with local market fluency
Composition: centered title hierarchy with speaker portrait placement, generous top and bottom margins for projector-safe viewing
Subject: GPT-5.5 product launch announcement, speaker Sam Altman, financing round context
Scene/backdrop: neutral gradient or subtle tech-inspired texture that doesn't compete with text legibility
Lighting/mood: professional confidence, the quiet authority of a term-sheet conversation
Color palette: neutral slate and white with one accent color signaling trust and innovation (deep blue or muted gold)
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): GPT-5.5发布 / 演讲人：奥特曼 (Sam Altman) / 融资发布会
Constraints: all text must remain legible when projected, portrait placement follows Chinese roadshow conventions (typically upper right or left with clear visual hierarchy), must feel at home in a Beijing or Shanghai VC meeting room
Avoid: overly decorative gradients, Western startup clichés (rocket ships, unicorns), excessive ornamentation that distracts from the financing narrative, illegible text at projection distance
